name: Poppy Seed Snack Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 package White cake mix without pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake and pudding mixes, eggs, water, and oil; beat for 2 minutes.
2. Fold in the poppy seeds.
3. Pour the batter into two greased and floured loaf pans.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35 - 40 minutes or until golden brown.
